title: Ishenn

{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Ishenn |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]]{{JournalCite|15|Laughter After Dark (short story)}} |gender= |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Whose idea was it to put a Gamorrean in charge of a diplomatic security team?''"
"''Ishenn had promise.|Thaddeus Ross and Trep Winterrs|}} '''Ishenn''' was a [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] who was employed by [[Thaddeus Ross]] and [[Trep Winterrs]] to lead a diplomatic security detail. Ishenn failed to protect the [[Ambassador/Legends|ambassador]] they were assigned to protect. ==Appearances== *{{JournalCite|15|Laughter After Dark (short story)}} {{1stm}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Gamorreans]] [[Category:Males]]
